## Description

Provide a summary of the changes and the motivation/context behind them.

Fixes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code styling / Formatting / Linting update

## Verification Plan

### Automated Tests

- Describe the tests you added or run to verify your changes.
- Include commands run: `npm run test` or `bun test`.

### Manual Verification

- Outline the steps taken to verify the correctness of the code.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (run `npm run format`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new lint warnings (run `npm run lint`).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes (run `npm run test`).
